title: Hawliad sy’n ymwneud â thâl
legend: Pa fath o hawliad sy’n ymwneud â thâl mae'r hawlydd yn ei wneud?
detailsText: [W]It is against the law for an employer to withhold pay after an employee has carried out work for them. This can also include unlawful deduction of pay.

claimTypePay.required: [W]Tell us what type of pay claim the claimant is making
